assertions.assertion: Uses ClaimMappings dictionary on SamlServiceProvider for per-SP attribute mapping
assertions.rationale: Uses 'ClaimMapping' (singular) instead of the correct 'ClaimMappings' property name, and on 'ServiceProvider' not 'SamlServiceProvider'.

assertions.assertion: Explains or shows AllowedScopes as a prerequisite for claims reaching ClaimMappings
assertions.rationale: No mention of AllowedScopes as a prerequisite for claims being available.

assertions.assertion: Shows how to set DefaultClaimMappings on SamlOptions for global defaults
assertions.rationale: Uses 'DefaultAttributeMapping' instead of the correct 'DefaultClaimMappings' property name.

assertions.assertion: The mapping correctly associates OIDC claim names (keys) to SAML attribute URIs (values)
assertions.rationale: The direction is correct — internal claim names as keys, SAML URIs as values.
